text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
The Yasuda Kinen is almost here! Oguri's
definitely gonna be hard to beat. I've got to keep
training till the last second if I want to stand a
chance.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I've got to make sure to thank Oguri! If it
wasn't for her, I would never have been able to
get so fired up!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ohhh, I get it now! That's what Oguri means to me!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Yasuda Kinen and Oguri's in
great shape! She even went out of her way to talk
to me!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Raaah! I'm really burning hot now! I'm not gonna
lose! I'll use this race to show Yaeno what Oguri
really is!
